title: gitmap find-next --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap find-next --json`. Top-level is an array of per-repo rows joining Repo + latest VersionProbe. Empty result encodes as `[]`.

repo.description: Embedded model.ScanRecord for the repository. Field set is pinned by gitmap/cmd/findnextjson_contract_test.go; this schema intentionally allows passthrough so a ScanRecord column addition (e.g. transport, repoId, discoveredUrl) doesn't ripple-break every find-next consumer.

nextVersionTag.description: The next available version tag for this repo (e.g. "v1.2.3").

nextVersionNum.description: Numeric representation of nextVersionTag for sortable comparisons.

probedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the underlying VersionProbe row was recorded.
